creator: seggers@semyam.dinoco.de
text:
The man page for script doesn't mention what the default for
the option -t is.  It's 30 seconds in -current as I found out by
reading the source.

Fix: 

Add some indication what the default value is when one omits
the option -t.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Read script(1) and tell me what the default for the value the
option -t sets is.
